title: Avoid Mutable Default
description: Append value to a list and return it. Starter uses mutable default list.

hint_plan.level_1: A default argument like `[]` is created once and reused across calls.
hint_plan.level_2: That shared list makes later calls see leftover items—classic Python gotcha.
hint_plan.level_3: Use `items=None` and set `items = []` inside the function when needed.
hint_plan.level_4: Or build a fresh list each time before appending.
